name: lhdlam
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace — testkit: AI test-automation toolkit for testers (web + desktop) under a unified /testkit:* namespace.

plugins.name: testkit
plugins.description: AI test-automation toolkit. Declarative 6-phase pipeline + pluggable target profiles (web-playwright, web-from-docs, web-blackbox, desktop-pyside6). Agent writes tests, Playwright/pytest runs them. For testers. Claude Code (enforced) + Cursor (advisory).
